title: [firtool] No warning/error for ABI breaking module name

features.name: preprocessor macro with hierarchical path body
features.description: Code should include a `define macro whose replacement body is a hierarchical dot-separated signal reference (e.g., instance.signal), exercising the interaction between the preprocessor and hierarchical name resolution

features.name: module definition and macro definition sharing a name prefix in the same file
features.description: Code should include both a module definition and a `define macro whose name begins with the module name as a prefix, placed in the same compilation unit, to stress ABI and naming collision detection

features.name: module with probe output lowered to internal wire
features.description: Code should include a module that has a probe-typed output whose lowered SV representation is an internal wire with no corresponding formal output port, reflecting CIRCT's probe-lowering transformation
